messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0031",
  "title": "2025Q4",
  "page_index": 10,
  "page_range": "10-1"
}

Section text:
## 2025Q4

境·界刀鸣

iOS流水：1.09

玩家评分：8.4

动作·ARPG·IP

三国望神州

iOS流水：0.39

玩家评分：7.5

战旗·三国·国风

遗弃之地

iOS流水：0.50

玩家评分：4.9

策略·塔防

九牧之野

iOS流水：0.21

玩家评分：5.4

SLG·三国·战争

三国群英传：策定九州

iOS流水：0.48

评分：5.6

SLG·三国·战争

荒原曙光

iOS流水：0.19

玩家评分：4.9

沙盒·建造·生存

message.content: This section covers Q4 2025 video game performance metrics. It lists six specific game entities (境·界刀鸣, 三国望神州, 遗弃之地, 九牧之野, 三国群英传：策定九州, 荒原曙光) with corresponding iOS revenue (流水) figures, player rating scores, and genre tags. The data functions as a structured reference table to answer retrieval questions about: (1) specific Q4 2025 iOS revenue amounts and player ratings for each title, (2) genre classifications and gameplay categories, and (3) comparative performance rankings across the listed games. It provides direct quantitative evidence for tracking market reception and financial metrics during the specified quarter.
